title: Department Manager Vacancy at Pizza Hut India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Pizza Hut India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Pizza Hut India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pizza Hut India:
Pizza Hut India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India!
